founder.name: Carlos Mendez
founder.bio: Biomedical engineer. Building remote patient monitoring for chronic-care clinics.

company.name: Vitalink
company.one_liner: Remote monitoring platform for chronic-care clinics, integrating home devices into the EHR.

content.note: 2 paying clinics, a real integration into one EHR, but long healthcare sales cycles and heavy compliance load. Steady but capital-intensive. Mid-tier.
